news.title: Kash Patel’s clothing brand website shut down after reports it was hacked
news.summary: According to users on X, the website was hijacked by hackers in an attempt to trick visitors into installing malware.

news.title: Apple says Epic lawsuit shouldn’t reshape App Store rules for all developers
news.summary: Apple is asking the Supreme Court to narrow the App Store injunction won by Epic Games and overturn the court’s contempt ruling over external payment fees.

news.title: Spotify’s AI bet: more of everything, less of what you want
news.summary: Spotify has released a bunch of AI-powered tools that nudge users to create more content. It can be a bit much.

news.title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
news.summary: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.

news.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
news.summary: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of view.

news.title: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
news.summary: There is a harsh truth about Elon Musk's "truth-seeking" AI chatbot Grok: It's not very good, and not many people are using it. news.title: Police boast of hacking VPN where criminals "believed themselves to be safe"
news.summary: Law enforcement intercepted VPN traffic, seized domains, and arrested its operator.

news.title: Review: The Mandalorian and Grogu is ... fine
news.summary: The plot is predictable, the fight scenes are meh, but you can't beat the charm of that little green Grogu.

news.title: Even If You Hate AI, You Will Use Google AI Search
news.summary: The search giant’s AI-crafted answers are so convenient, you’ll be sucked in—to the detriment of the web and the artists and thinkers behind it.
